select(
            Organization.id,
            Organization.name,
            Organization.slug,
            Organization.created_at,
            func.count(User.id).label("user_count"),
        )
        .outerjoin(User, User.org_id == Organization.id)
        .group_by(Organization.id)
        .order_by(Organization.created_at.desc())
        .offset(offset)
        .limit
